about_text_1: At the foot of the Atlas Mountains stands a palace of unique charm and refined elegance.
about_text_2: Combining Arab-Moorish architecture with contemporary luxury, Alhambra offers an unforgettable experience.
accommodation_text: Elegant accommodations meticulously appointed with refined comfort and luxury amenities.
rooms_intro: Each room at Alhambra is a carefully composed sanctuary — where contemporary elegance meets the warmth of Moroccan craftsmanship.
suites_intro: The Alhambra Suites are singular worlds — intimate sanctuaries shaped by centuries of Moroccan artistry.
villas_intro: The Alhambra Villas are not merely accommodations — they are private kingdoms.
spa_text: Discover a sanctuary dedicated to relaxation, rejuvenation and holistic wellbeing.
restaurant_text: Experience world-class cuisine in a refined atmosphere inspired by Moroccan elegance.
amenity_concierge_desc: Private tours, reservations, and bespoke experiences across Tangier.
amenity_pool_desc: Heated terrace pool with views of the Strait of Gibraltar.
amenity_transfer_desc: Mercedes fleet from Tangier Ibn Battouta Airport and city centre.
amenity_butler_desc: Personal butler service for suites, villas, and royal accommodations.
